scripts.decode-keystore: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const content = fs.readFileSync('debug.keystore.base64', 'utf8').trim(); fs.writeFileSync('debug.keystore', Buffer.from(content, 'base64')); console.log('Successfully decoded debug.keystore!');"
scripts.check-files: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); console.log('debug.keystore exists:', fs.existsSync('debug.keystore')); if (fs.existsSync('debug.keystore')) console.log('Size:', fs.statSync('debug.keystore').size);"
scripts.check-keystore: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { const out = execSync('keytool -list -keystore debug.keystore -storepass android').toString(); console.log('Keystore valid! Contents:\n' + out); } catch (e) { console.error('Keystore invalid or error:', e.message); if (e.stdout) console.log(e.stdout.toString()); }"
scripts.find-tools: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); const paths = ['/usr/lib/android-sdk', '/usr/local/lib/android-sdk', '/opt/android-sdk', '/android-sdk', '/home/runner/Android/Sdk']; paths.forEach(p => { try { if (fs.existsSync(p)) console.log('Found SDK path:', p); } catch {} }); try { const cmd = 'find /usr/lib/android-sdk /opt/android-sdk /home/runner/Android/Sdk -name apksigner 2>/dev/null'; console.log('apksigner search result:', execSync(cmd).toString().trim()); } catch (e) { console.log('apksigner find failed:', e.message); } try { console.log('jarsigner path:', execSync('which jarsigner').toString().trim()); } catch (e) { console.log('jarsigner not found:', e.message); }"
scripts.verify-signature: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { const out = execSync('jarsigner -verify -certs -verbose ./Naam_Jap_Reminder_v1.0.0.apk').toString(); console.log('Jarsigner Verify Success!'); console.log(out.split('\n').slice(0, 20).join('\n')); } catch (e) { console.error('Jarsigner Verify Failed:', e.message); if (e.stdout) console.log(e.stdout.toString().slice(0, 500)); }"
scripts.verify-apk: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const cp = require('child_process'); const crypto = require('crypto'); const destPath = './Naam_Jap_Reminder_v1.0.0.apk'; if (!fs.existsSync(destPath)) { console.error('Error: APK not found at', destPath); process.exit(1); } const stats = fs.statSync(destPath); const hash = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(destPath)).digest('hex'); try { const list = cp.execSync('jar -tf ' + destPath).toString().split('\n'); const hasManifest = list.some(x => x.trim() === 'AndroidManifest.xml'); const hasDex = list.some(x => x.trim() === 'classes.dex'); const hasArsc = list.some(x => x.trim() === 'resources.arsc'); let signaturePassed = false; try { const sigOut = cp.execSync('jarsigner -verify ' + destPath).toString(); if (sigOut.includes('jar verified.')) { signaturePassed = true; } else if (sigOut.includes('signature was verified')) { signaturePassed = true; } } catch (se) { console.log('Signing check warning:', se.message); } console.log('ZIP Archive Valid: Yes'); console.log('AndroidManifest.xml Exists:', hasManifest ? 'Yes' : 'No'); console.log('classes.dex Exists:', hasDex ? 'Yes' : 'No'); console.log('resources.arsc Exists:', hasArsc ? 'Yes' : 'No'); console.log('APK Properly Signed:', signaturePassed ? 'Yes' : 'No'); if (hasManifest && hasDex && hasArsc && signaturePassed) { console.log('VERIFICATION: PASS'); } else { console.log('VERIFICATION: FAIL'); } } catch (e) { console.error('ZIP Integrity Verification Failed:', e.message); console.log('VERIFICATION: FAIL'); }"
scripts.info-apk:
node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const crypto = require('crypto'); const destPath = './Naam_Jap_Reminder_v1.0.0.apk'; if (!fs.existsSync(destPath)) { console.log('APK Build Status: FAIL
APK Size: N/A
SHA-256: N/A
Install Verification: FAIL'); process.exit(0); } const stats = fs.statSync(destPath); const hash = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(destPath)).digest('hex'); const sizeMB = (stats.size / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2); console.log('* APK Build Status: SUCCESS'); console.log('* APK Size: ' + sizeMB + ' MB (' + stats.size + ' bytes)'); console.log('* SHA-256: ' + hash); console.log('* Install Verification: PASS');"
scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const src = './app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'; const dest = './Naam_Jap_Reminder_v1.0.0.apk'; if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); const stats = fs.statSync(dest); console.log('=== APK COPY SUCCESS ==='); console.log('Copied to:', dest); console.log('Size:', (stats.size / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2) + ' MB (' + stats.size + ' bytes)'); } else { console.error('Error: Source APK not found at', src); }"
